passes.benefits_text: (617) 426-6500 Admits up to 4 (adults or children) at half price per person. After receiving a library discount pass, you must reserve a visit online with Boston Children’s Museum. Due to safety measures, walk-ins are not allowed. Museum capacity is limited at this time. This e-ticket is valid only for one day. You can either print it out and take it with you or display the pass on your phone or device. Either way, please be sure that the pass barcode is visible. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
passes.label: 50% off

passes.benefits_text: 617-223-8666 Half-priced ferry tickets to the Boston Harbor Islands national park areas for up to 4 people. After booking this library pass, follow the instructions in your confirmation email to book a ferry reservation. The code can be used to purchase discounted tickets to Spectacle Island, Georges Island and Peddocks Island. Please refer to the Ferry Schedule at: https://bostonharborislands.org/ferryschedule For all activities visit Resources at https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1D_JeZy1VwWfKJOH48jvKlslF806UEraY Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
passes.label: 50% off

passes.address: 25 Harbor Shore Drive, Boston, MA 02210., Boston, MA, 02210
passes.benefits_text: 617-478-3100 Library passes admit 2 people at $10 per person. 1. Patrons must first acquire a valid digital library pass at their participating library to receive this discount. 2. Purchase tickets online: https://www.icaboston.org/ Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.

617-566-1401 The discount offers half-price off General Admission for up to 4 visitors. Any additional tickets will be normally priced (Children under 18 are always free and should be reserved as child tickets) This library pass does not guarantee a reservation to the Museum. If you have any issues reserving your tickets, you can call the Gardner Museum's Box Office at 617 278 5156. PATRONS MUST PRESENT BOTH THIS LIBRARY PASS AND THEIR RESERVED TIMED MUSEUM ADMISSION TICKETS FOR ENTRY INTO THE MUSEUM. For more information, including health and safety requirements, please visit isgm.org/welcome MUSEUM HOURS: WEEKDAYS 11 AM – 5 PM | WEEKENDS 10 AM – 5 PM | THURSDAYS 11 AM – 9 PM | CLOSED TUESDAYS Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
passes.label: 50% off

passes.title_raw: Maplewood Country Day Camp & Enrichment Center
passes.museum_name: Maplewood Country Day Camp & Enrichment Center
passes.benefits_text: 508-238-2387 Admits up to 2 children for $12 each. Not valid on Saturdays. Valid for either a Morning (9:30 am-12:00 pm) or an Afternoon session (1:30 - 5:00 pm) To use the facility you must complete an online waiver. Click here Maplewood Indoor/outdoor playground is open during school-year months for children 6 years old and younger. All children must be accompanied by an adult. No charge for infants (under 1 year of age.) All children and adults are required to wear grip socks to enter the playground space. Attendees are welcome to bring their own or purchase them at Maplewood. Contact Maplewood Country Day Camp & Enrichment Center on 150 Foundry Street, South Easton, MA, 02375 at 508-238-2387 to confirm your reservation and time. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
passes.link_name: Maplewood Country Day Camp & Enrichment Center

passes.benefits_text: 617-267-9300 The Museum is open Wednesday through Monday. Each pass now allows admission for 2 adults at $15 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $14. Children 6 and under are free. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.

passes.address: 1 Science Park Boston, MA 02114, Boston, MA, 02114
passes.benefits_text: (617) 723-2500 This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free. You do not need to call ahead to reserve a timed ticket. If you have questions or prefer to reserve in advance, you can call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily). Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
passes.label: Free

passes.benefits_text: 617-973-6555 This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium. Only applies to adult and child pricing. This is not a ticket. Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people. Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details. Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience. Valid only for Aquarium admission. This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets. Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold. Void if altered or copied. No cash value. Hours of operation are subject to change. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
passes.label: 50% off

passes.address: 1 Franklin Park Rd. Boston, MA 02121 617-541-LION (5466), Boston, MA, 02121
passes.benefits_text: 617-541-5466 Each pass admits 6 people. Adults are $9 per person and children are $6 per person. The pass is good for either the Stone Zoo or the Franklin Park Zoo. The pass is a physical coupon and you need to pick it up at the Milton Public Library before going to the zoo. PLEASE BRING YOUR CONFIRMATION EMAIL TO THE MPL TO PICK UP YOUR PASS BEFORE GOING TO THE ZOO Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available.
